name: carsale
description: JDM car auction ordering platform for Sri Lankan customers.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace apps/client" "npm run dev --workspace apps/scraper-worker"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/client
